perspectives.name: Operations Skeptic
perspectives.question: Is the PM masking deterioration?
perspectives.challengeThreshold: Any variance >5% from budget explained away as timing

perspectives.name: Market Cycle Bear
perspectives.question: Is the submarket turning against this hold thesis?
perspectives.challengeThreshold: Rent growth below proforma for 2+ consecutive quarters

perspectives.name: Capital Structure Stress
perspectives.question: Can the debt terms survive a rate reset or covenant breach?
perspectives.challengeThreshold: DSCR cushion below 15% or maturity within 18 months

perspectives.name: Tenant Concentration Risk
perspectives.question: What happens if the top 3 tenants leave?
perspectives.challengeThreshold: Top 3 tenants >30% revenue AND any lease expiring within 12 months

verdictReconciliation: Challenge verdict overrides pipeline verdict if it differs
